header_01: SERVICE REQUEST FROM R & D BY INTERNATIONAL LICENSEE OPERATIONS
answer_07: Advise if locally obtained Yucatan Honey (sample enclosed) is an acceptable substitute for HALWAY.
answer_09: a) Nature of work should be specified in exact terms.
answer_10: b) R & D should advise if completion date cannot be met.
answer_11: c) Two copies of this form to be sent to R & D by initiator and R & D is to return to T. O. one completed copy.
